bead.title: implement: GET /api/providers and /api/providers/:harness endpoints
bead.description: FEAT-002 requirements 26-27 and FEAT-014 read model specify provider availability and utilization endpoints that are not yet implemented. Required: GET /api/providers (list all configured harnesses with routing availability, auth state, quota/headroom, freshness), GET /api/providers/:harness (full routing signal snapshot per FEAT-014 read-model fields), MCP tools ddx_provider_list and ddx_provider_show (host+user global, not project-scoped). Field semantics, unknown-state rules (zero-fabrication contract), and tooltip registry are governed by FEAT-014. Provider dashboard in FEAT-008 depends on these endpoints.
bead.acceptance: GET /api/providers returns provider summary array; GET /api/providers/:harness returns full detail per FEAT-014 read model; MCP tools ddx_provider_list and ddx_provider_show are registered; unknown fields render as unknown not zero; Go unit tests cover provider list and detail responses
